ReleaseNotes: Updated the Treatment Process workflow with a clearer step-by-step experience from PREOP review through target planning, ablation planning, and calculation summary.
Improved the display of pachymetry and residual-thickness information so important values are easier to review during planning.
Added clearer support for flap or transepithelial thickness adjustment during treatment planning.
Improved automatic import and restore of treatment-session information to reduce manual re-entry and make interrupted work easier to continue.
Refined export-related behavior and overall workflow messaging for a smoother day-to-day user experience.
